entries.signature: public class SKPathBuilder : SkiaSharp.SKObject

fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`SKPathBuilder` is a mutable builder for constructing <xref:SkiaSharp.SKPath> objects. Unlike
`SKPath`, the builder exposes efficient, composable geometry operations including relative
coordinate variants.

When you are finished building, call <xref:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder.Snapshot> to produce a
copy of the current path while keeping the builder ready for further use, or call
<xref:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder.Detach> to take ownership of the path and reset the builder.

Methods prefixed with **R** (e.g., `RMoveTo`, `RLineTo`) use coordinates relative to the
current point rather than absolute canvas coordinates.

## Examples

```csharp
using var builder = new SKPathBuilder();
builder.MoveTo(10, 10);
builder.LineTo(100, 10);
builder.LineTo(100, 100);
builder.Close();

using var path = builder.Detach();
canvas.DrawPath(path, paint);
```
]]></format>
fields.summary: A mutable builder for constructing <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPath" /> objects.
Initializes a new instance of the <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder" /> class with no geometry.

entries.signature: public SKPathBuilder ();

fields.summary: Initializes a new instance of the <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder" /> class, pre-populated with the geometry of an existing path.

params.path: The path whose geometry is copied into the new builder.

entries.signature: public SKPathBuilder (SkiaSharp.SKPath path);

fields.summary: Appends an arc of the ellipse bounded by the specified rectangle to the path.

params.oval: The bounding rectangle of the ellipse.
params.sweepAngle: The angular extent of the arc in degrees. Positive values sweep clockwise.
params.startAngle: The starting angle of the arc, in degrees, measured clockwise from the positive x-axis.

entries.signature: public void AddArc (SkiaSharp.SKRect oval, float startAngle, float sweepAngle);

fields.summary: Appends a complete circle contour to the path.

params.dir: The winding direction of the circle contour.
params.y: The y-coordinate of the center of the circle.
params.x: The x-coordinate of the center of the circle.

entries.signature: public void AddCircle (float x, float y, float radius, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection dir = SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection.Clockwise);

fields.summary: Appends a complete oval (ellipse) contour bounded by the specified rectangle to the path.

params.rect: The bounding rectangle of the oval.
params.direction: The winding direction of the oval contour.

entries.signature: public void AddOval (SkiaSharp.SKRect rect, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection direction = SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection.Clockwise);

fields.summary: Appends all contours of another path to this builder.

params.mode: Controls whether the appended path is joined to the last contour or added as a new contour.
params.other: The path whose contours are appended.

entries.signature: public void AddPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath other, SkiaSharp.SKPathAddMode mode = SkiaSharp.SKPathAddMode.Append);

fields.summary: Appends all contours of another path to this builder after applying a matrix transform.

params.other: The path whose contours are appended.
params.mode: Controls whether the appended path is joined to the last contour or added as a new contour.
params.matrix: The transform to apply to each point of <paramref name="other" /> before appending.

entries.signature: public void AddPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath other, in SkiaSharp.SKMatrix matrix, SkiaSharp.SKPathAddMode mode = SkiaSharp.SKPathAddMode.Append);

fields.summary: Appends all contours of another path to this builder after applying a translation offset.

params.dy: The vertical offset to apply to each point of <paramref name="other" />.
params.other: The path whose contours are appended.
params.mode: Controls whether the appended path is joined to the last contour or added as a new contour.
params.dx: The horizontal offset to apply to each point of <paramref name="other" />.

entries.signature: public void AddPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath other, float dx, float dy, SkiaSharp.SKPathAddMode mode = SkiaSharp.SKPathAddMode.Append);

fields.summary: Appends a polygon defined by an array of points to the path.

params.close: true to close the polygon by appending a line back to the first point; false to leave it open.
params.points: An array of points defining the polygon vertices.

entries.signature: public void AddPoly (SkiaSharp.SKPoint[] points, bool close = true);

fields.summary: Appends a polygon defined by a span of points to the path.

params.close: true to close the polygon by appending a line back to the first point; false to leave it open.
params.points: A read-only span of points defining the polygon vertices.

entries.signature: public void AddPoly (ReadOnlySpan<SkiaSharp.SKPoint> points, bool close = true);

fields.summary: Appends a rectangle contour to the path.

params.direction: The winding direction of the rectangle contour.

entries.signature: public void AddRect (SkiaSharp.SKRect rect, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection direction = SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection.Clockwise);

fields.summary: Appends a rectangle contour to the path, starting from a specified corner.

params.direction: The winding direction of the rectangle contour.
params.startIndex: The zero-based index of the corner at which to start (0=top-left, 1=top-right, 2=bottom-right, 3=bottom-left for clockwise).

entries.signature: public void AddRect (SkiaSharp.SKRect rect, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection direction, uint startIndex);

fields.summary: Appends a round rectangle contour to the path.

params.direction: The winding direction of the round rectangle contour.

entries.signature: public void AddRoundRect (SkiaSharp.SKRoundRect rect, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection direction = SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection.Clockwise);

fields.summary: Appends a round rectangle contour to the path, starting from a specified corner.

params.direction: The winding direction of the round rectangle contour.
params.startIndex: The zero-based index of the corner at which to start the contour.

entries.signature: public void AddRoundRect (SkiaSharp.SKRoundRect rect, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection direction, uint startIndex);

fields.summary: Appends a round rectangle contour with uniform corner radii to the path.

params.rx: The x-axis radius of the rounded corners.
params.ry: The y-axis radius of the rounded corners.
params.dir: The winding direction of the round rectangle contour.

entries.signature: public void AddRoundRect (SkiaSharp.SKRect rect, float rx, float ry, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection dir = SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection.Clockwise);

fields.summary: Appends a tangent arc to the path using two tangent lines and a radius.

params.radius: The radius of the circular arc.
params.point2: The end point of the second tangent line, from <paramref name="point1" />.
params.point1: The end point of the first tangent line, from the current point.

entries.signature: public void ArcTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point1, SkiaSharp.SKPoint point2, float radius);

fields.summary: Appends an elliptical arc to the path.

params.forceMoveTo: true to begin the arc with a move-to regardless of the current point; false to connect the arc from the current point.
params.oval: The bounding rectangle of the ellipse.
params.sweepAngle: The angular extent of the arc in degrees.
params.startAngle: The starting angle of the arc in degrees, measured clockwise from the positive x-axis.

entries.signature: public void ArcTo (SkiaSharp.SKRect oval, float startAngle, float sweepAngle, bool forceMoveTo);

fields.summary: Appends an SVG-style elliptical arc to the path.

params.xy: The end point of the arc.
params.largeArc: Specifies whether to use the large or small arc.
params.xAxisRotate: The rotation of the ellipse's x-axis relative to the canvas x-axis, in degrees.
params.sweep: Specifies whether to sweep in the clockwise or counter-clockwise direction.
params.r: The radii of the ellipse along the x and y axes.

entries.signature: public void ArcTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint r, float xAxisRotate, SkiaSharp.SKPathArcSize largeArc, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection sweep, SkiaSharp.SKPoint xy);

fields.summary: Appends a tangent arc to the path using two tangent lines and a radius.

params.y1: The y-coordinate of the end point of the first tangent line.
params.x1: The x-coordinate of the end point of the first tangent line.
params.radius: The radius of the circular arc.
params.x2: The x-coordinate of the end point of the second tangent line.
params.y2: The y-coordinate of the end point of the second tangent line.

entries.signature: public void ArcTo (float x1, float y1, float x2, float y2, float radius);

fields.summary: Appends an SVG-style elliptical arc to the path using individual components.

params.rx: The x-axis radius of the ellipse.
params.xAxisRotate: The rotation of the ellipse's x-axis, in degrees.
params.sweep: Specifies whether to sweep in the clockwise or counter-clockwise direction.
params.largeArc: Specifies whether to use the large or small arc.
params.x: The x-coordinate of the end point.
params.ry: The y-axis radius of the ellipse.
params.y: The y-coordinate of the end point.

entries.signature: public void ArcTo (float rx, float ry, float xAxisRotate, SkiaSharp.SKPathArcSize largeArc, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection sweep, float x, float y);

fields.summary: Closes the current contour by appending a straight line from the current point back to the start of the contour.

entries.signature: public void Close ();

fields.summary: Appends a rational quadratic (conic) Bézier curve to the path.

params.w: The weight of the control point. A weight of 1 produces a quadratic Bézier; values greater than 1 pull the curve toward the control point.

entries.signature: public void ConicTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point0, SkiaSharp.SKPoint point1, float w);

fields.summary: Appends a rational quadratic (conic) Bézier curve to the path using individual coordinates.

params.y1: The y-coordinate of the end point.
params.x1: The x-coordinate of the end point.
params.w: The weight of the control point.
params.x0: The x-coordinate of the control point.
params.y0: The y-coordinate of the control point.

entries.signature: public void ConicTo (float x0, float y0, float x1, float y1, float w);

fields.summary: Appends a cubic Bézier curve to the path.

entries.signature: public void CubicTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point0, SkiaSharp.SKPoint point1, SkiaSharp.SKPoint point2);

fields.summary: Appends a cubic Bézier curve to the path using individual coordinates.

params.y2: The y-coordinate of the end point.
params.x0: The x-coordinate of the first control point.
params.x1: The x-coordinate of the second control point.
params.y1: The y-coordinate of the second control point.
params.y0: The y-coordinate of the first control point.
params.x2: The x-coordinate of the end point.

entries.signature: public void CubicTo (float x0, float y0, float x1, float y1, float x2, float y2);

fields.returns: An <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPath" /> containing all geometry added to the builder. The caller is responsible for disposing this path.
fields.summary: Transfers ownership of the built path to the caller and resets the builder to an empty state.

entries.signature: public SkiaSharp.SKPath Detach ();

fields.summary: Releases the native resources held by the <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder" />.

params.disposing: true to release both managed and native resources; false to release only native resources.

entries.signature: protected override void Dispose (bool disposing);

fields.summary: Releases the native resources held by the <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder" />.

entries.signature: protected override void DisposeNative ();

fields.value: An <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPathFillType" /> that controls how the interior of the path is determined. The default is <see cref="F:SkiaSharp.SKPathFillType.Winding" />.
fields.summary: Gets or sets the fill type rule for the path.

entries.signature: public SkiaSharp.SKPathFillType FillType { get; set; }

fields.summary: Appends a straight line from the current point to the specified point.

params.point: The end point of the line.

entries.signature: public void LineTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point);

fields.summary: Appends a straight line from the current point to the specified coordinates.

params.x: The x-coordinate of the end point.
params.y: The y-coordinate of the end point.

entries.signature: public void LineTo (float x, float y);

fields.summary: Begins a new contour at the specified point.

params.point: The starting point of the new contour.

entries.signature: public void MoveTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point);

fields.summary: Begins a new contour at the specified coordinates.

params.x: The x-coordinate of the starting point.
params.y: The y-coordinate of the starting point.

entries.signature: public void MoveTo (float x, float y);

fields.summary: Appends a quadratic Bézier curve to the path.

entries.signature: public void QuadTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point0, SkiaSharp.SKPoint point1);

fields.summary: Appends a quadratic Bézier curve to the path using individual coordinates.

params.y1: The y-coordinate of the end point.
params.x1: The x-coordinate of the end point.
params.x0: The x-coordinate of the control point.
params.y0: The y-coordinate of the control point.

entries.signature: public void QuadTo (float x0, float y0, float x1, float y1);

fields.summary: Appends a relative SVG-style elliptical arc to the path.

params.xy: The end point relative to the current point.
params.largeArc: Specifies whether to use the large or small arc.
params.xAxisRotate: The rotation of the ellipse's x-axis, in degrees.
params.sweep: Specifies whether to sweep in the clockwise or counter-clockwise direction.
params.r: The radii of the ellipse along the x and y axes.

entries.signature: public void RArcTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint r, float xAxisRotate, SkiaSharp.SKPathArcSize largeArc, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection sweep, SkiaSharp.SKPoint xy);

fields.summary: Appends a relative SVG-style elliptical arc to the path using individual components.

params.rx: The x-axis radius of the ellipse.
params.xAxisRotate: The rotation of the ellipse's x-axis, in degrees.
params.sweep: Specifies whether to sweep in the clockwise or counter-clockwise direction.
params.largeArc: Specifies whether to use the large or small arc.
params.x: The x offset of the end point relative to the current point.
params.ry: The y-axis radius of the ellipse.
params.y: The y offset of the end point relative to the current point.

entries.signature: public void RArcTo (float rx, float ry, float xAxisRotate, SkiaSharp.SKPathArcSize largeArc, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection sweep, float x, float y);

fields.summary: Appends a relative rational quadratic (conic) Bézier curve to the path.

params.w: The weight of the control point.
params.point0: The control point relative to the current point.
params.point1: The end point relative to the current point.

entries.signature: public void RConicTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point0, SkiaSharp.SKPoint point1, float w);

fields.summary: Appends a relative rational quadratic (conic) Bézier curve to the path using individual coordinates.

params.dx0: The x offset of the control point relative to the current point.
params.dx1: The x offset of the end point relative to the current point.
params.dy0: The y offset of the control point relative to the current point.
params.dy1: The y offset of the end point relative to the current point.
params.w: The weight of the control point.

entries.signature: public void RConicTo (float dx0, float dy0, float dx1, float dy1, float w);

fields.summary: Appends a relative cubic Bézier curve to the path.

params.point2: The end point relative to the current point.
params.point0: The first control point relative to the current point.
params.point1: The second control point relative to the current point.

entries.signature: public void RCubicTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point0, SkiaSharp.SKPoint point1, SkiaSharp.SKPoint point2);

fields.summary: Appends a relative cubic Bézier curve to the path using individual coordinates.

params.dy1: The y offset of the second control point relative to the current point.
params.dy2: The y offset of the end point relative to the current point.
params.dx2: The x offset of the end point relative to the current point.
params.dx0: The x offset of the first control point relative to the current point.
params.dy0: The y offset of the first control point relative to the current point.
params.dx1: The x offset of the second control point relative to the current point.

entries.signature: public void RCubicTo (float dx0, float dy0, float dx1, float dy1, float dx2, float dy2);

fields.summary: Resets the builder to an empty state, clearing all geometry and restoring the default fill type.

entries.signature: public void Reset ();

fields.summary: Appends the contours of another path in reverse order to this builder.

params.other: The path whose contours are appended in reverse.

entries.signature: public void ReverseAddPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath other);

fields.summary: Appends a straight line from the current point to a point specified by a relative offset.

params.point: The offset from the current point to the end point of the line.

entries.signature: public void RLineTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point);

fields.summary: Appends a straight line from the current point to a point specified by relative offsets.

params.dy: The y offset from the current point to the end point.
params.dx: The x offset from the current point to the end point.

entries.signature: public void RLineTo (float dx, float dy);

fields.summary: Begins a new contour at a point specified by a relative offset from the current point.

params.point: The offset from the current point to the starting point of the new contour.

entries.signature: public void RMoveTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point);

fields.summary: Begins a new contour at a point specified by relative offsets from the current point.

params.dy: The y offset from the current point.
params.dx: The x offset from the current point.

entries.signature: public void RMoveTo (float dx, float dy);

fields.summary: Appends a relative quadratic Bézier curve to the path.

params.point0: The control point relative to the current point.
params.point1: The end point relative to the current point.

entries.signature: public void RQuadTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point0, SkiaSharp.SKPoint point1);

fields.summary: Appends a relative quadratic Bézier curve to the path using individual coordinates.

params.dx0: The x offset of the control point relative to the current point.
params.dx1: The x offset of the end point relative to the current point.
params.dy0: The y offset of the control point relative to the current point.
params.dy1: The y offset of the end point relative to the current point.

entries.signature: public void RQuadTo (float dx0, float dy0, float dx1, float dy1);

fields.returns: An <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPath" /> containing a copy of the geometry built so far. The builder remains ready for further use.
fields.summary: Returns a snapshot of the current path without modifying the builder.

entries.signature: public SkiaSharp.SKPath Snapshot ();
